name: CtaLink
description: Outline call-to-action pill wrapping a labelled markdown link. Owns its full shape; every color comes from the org theme (border accent, prose link) — the brand lives in tokens, never here.
whenToUse: The standard outline CTA that opens a content link in a new tab. Components COMPOSE this atom via a Ref node, mapping their link field via props.

brief.description: A markdown link to THIS item's own page — the real URL taken verbatim from the content, never invented. Label: 2-4 words, ALL CAPITALS, in the guest's language: [SEE THE ROOFTOP](its-url).
